testcase.name: test_add_opening_capital_entry

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing cash_book_entry_id - capital entry should create cash book entry assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 100000.0, 'entry_id': '44fa1a53-169a-46e2-81af-af8066a4aaf6', 'message': 'Opening Capital entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.failure: tests/test_capital_trial_balance.py:60: in test_add_opening_capital_entry assert "cash_book_entry_id" in data, "Missing cash_book_entry_id - capital entry should create cash book entry" E AssertionError: Missing cash_book_entry_id - capital entry should create cash book entry E assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 100000.0, 'entry_id': '44fa1a53-169a-46e2-81af-af8066a4aaf6', 'message': 'Opening Capital entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.name: test_add_additional_capital_entry

failure.message: AssertionError: Additional capital should create cash book entry assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 50000.0, 'entry_id': '28a1fc26-a3a8-4dc3-97d4-853863297d99', 'message': 'Additional Capital entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.failure: tests/test_capital_trial_balance.py:81: in test_add_additional_capital_entry assert "cash_book_entry_id" in data, "Additional capital should create cash book entry" E AssertionError: Additional capital should create cash book entry E assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 50000.0, 'entry_id': '28a1fc26-a3a8-4dc3-97d4-853863297d99', 'message': 'Additional Capital entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.name: test_add_drawings_entry

failure.message: AssertionError: Drawings should create cash book entry assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 10000.0, 'entry_id': 'a474ded9-f2b7-44a4-9c16-da0080d617ca', 'message': 'Drawings entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.failure: tests/test_capital_trial_balance.py:102: in test_add_drawings_entry assert "cash_book_entry_id" in data, "Drawings should create cash book entry" E AssertionError: Drawings should create cash book entry E assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 10000.0, 'entry_id': 'a474ded9-f2b7-44a4-9c16-da0080d617ca', 'message': 'Drawings entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.name: test_capital_creates_cash_book_entry

failure.message: AssertionError: Capital entry should create cash book entry assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 25000.0, 'entry_id': '7a26a032-4a7b-4a86-9aed-8dc47cfcec2a', 'message': 'Opening Capital entry added successfully', 'success': True}

testcase.failure: tests/test_capital_trial_balance.py:331: in test_capital_creates_cash_book_entry assert "cash_book_entry_id" in data, "Capital entry should create cash book entry" E AssertionError: Capital entry should create cash book entry E assert 'cash_book_entry_id' in {'amount': 25000.0, 'entry_id': '7a26a032-4a7b-4a86-9aed-8dc47cfcec2a', 'message': 'Opening Capital entry added successfully', 'success': True}
